verses.latin_vulgate: Verba Jeremiæ filii Helciæ, de sacerdotibus qui fuerunt in Anathoth, in terra Benjamin.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דִּבְרֵ֥י יִרְמְיָ֖הוּ בֶּן־חִלְקִיָּ֑הוּ מִן־הַכֹּֽהֲנִים֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר בַּעֲנָת֔וֹת בְּאֶ֖רֶץ בִּנְיָמִֽן׃
verses.king_james: The words of Jeremiah the son of Hilkiah, of the priests that were in Anathoth in the land of Benjamin:

verses.latin_vulgate: Quod factum est verbum Domini ad eum in diebus Josiæ filii Amon, regis Juda, in tertiodecimo anno regni ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲשֶׁ֨ר הָיָ֤ה דְבַר־יְהֹוָה֙ אֵלָ֔יו בִּימֵ֛י יֹאשִׁיָּ֥הוּ בֶן־אָמ֖וֹן מֶ֣לֶךְ יְהוּדָ֑ה בִּשְׁלֹשׁ־עֶשְׂרֵ֥ה שָׁנָ֖ה לְמׇלְכֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: To whom the word of the Lord came in the days of Josiah the son of Amon king of Judah, in the thirteenth year of his reign.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et factum est in diebus Joakim filii Josiæ, regis Juda, usque ad consummationem undecimi anni Sedeciæ, filii Josiæ, regis Juda, usque ad transmigrationem Jerusalem, in mense quinto.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֗י בִּימֵ֨י יְהוֹיָקִ֤ים בֶּן־יֹאשִׁיָּ֙הוּ֙ מֶ֣לֶךְ יְהוּדָ֔ה עַד־תֹּם֙ עַשְׁתֵּ֣י עֶשְׂרֵ֣ה שָׁנָ֔ה לְצִדְקִיָּ֥הוּ בֶן־יֹאשִׁיָּ֖הוּ מֶ֣לֶךְ יְהוּדָ֑ה עַד־גְּל֥וֹת יְרוּשָׁלַ֖͏ִם בַּחֹ֥דֶשׁ הַחֲמִישִֽׁי׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: It came also in the days of Jehoiakim the son of Josiah king of Judah, unto the end of the eleventh year of Zedekiah the son of Josiah king of Judah, unto the carrying away of Jerusalem captive in the fifth month.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et factum est verbum Domini ad me, dicens :
verses.king_james: Then the word of the Lord came unto me, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Priusquam te formarem in utero, novi te,  et antequam exires de vulva, sanctificavi te,  et prophetam in gentibus dedi te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּטֶ֨רֶם (אצורך) [אֶצׇּרְךָ֤] בַבֶּ֙טֶן֙ יְדַעְתִּ֔יךָ וּבְטֶ֛רֶם תֵּצֵ֥א מֵרֶ֖חֶם הִקְדַּשְׁתִּ֑יךָ נָבִ֥יא לַגּוֹיִ֖ם נְתַתִּֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: Before I formed thee in the belly I knew thee; and before thou camest forth out of the womb I sanctified thee, and I ordained thee a prophet unto the nations.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixi :  A, a, a, Domine Deus, ecce nescio loqui,  quia puer ego sum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֹמַ֗ר אֲהָהּ֙ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֔ה הִנֵּ֥ה לֹֽא־יָדַ֖עְתִּי דַּבֵּ֑ר כִּי־נַ֖עַר אָנֹֽכִי׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Then said I, Ah, Lord God! behold, I cannot speak: for I am a child.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit Dominus ad me :  Noli dicere : Puer sum :  quoniam ad omnia quæ mittam te ibis,  et universa quæcumque mandavero tibi loqueris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר יְהֹוָה֙ אֵלַ֔י אַל־תֹּאמַ֖ר נַ֣עַר אָנֹ֑כִי כִּ֠י עַֽל־כׇּל־אֲשֶׁ֤ר אֶֽשְׁלָחֲךָ֙ תֵּלֵ֔ךְ וְאֵ֛ת כׇּל־אֲשֶׁ֥ר אֲצַוְּךָ֖ תְּדַבֵּֽר׃
verses.king_james: But the Lord said unto me, Say not, I am a child: for thou shalt go to all that I shall send thee, and whatsoever I command thee thou shalt speak.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ne timeas a facie eorum,  quia tecum ego sum ut eruam te,  dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַל־תִּירָ֖א מִפְּנֵיהֶ֑ם כִּֽי־אִתְּךָ֥ אֲנִ֛י לְהַצִּלֶ֖ךָ נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Be not afraid of their faces: for I am with thee to deliver thee, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et misit Dominus manum suam, et tetigit os meum, et dixit Dominus ad me :  Ecce dedi verba mea in ore tuo :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁלַ֤ח יְהֹוָה֙ אֶת־יָד֔וֹ וַיַּגַּ֖ע עַל־פִּ֑י וַיֹּ֤אמֶר יְהֹוָה֙ אֵלַ֔י הִנֵּ֛ה נָתַ֥תִּי דְבָרַ֖י בְּפִֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: Then the Lord put forth his hand, and touched my mouth. And the Lord said unto me, Behold, I have put my words in thy mouth.

verses.latin_vulgate: ecce constitui te hodie  super gentes et super regna,  ut evellas, et destruas,  et disperdas, et dissipes,  et ædifices, et plantes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רְאֵ֞ה הִפְקַדְתִּ֣יךָ ׀ הַיּ֣וֹם הַזֶּ֗ה עַל־הַגּוֹיִם֙ וְעַל־הַמַּמְלָכ֔וֹת לִנְת֥וֹשׁ וְלִנְת֖וֹץ וּלְהַאֲבִ֣יד וְלַהֲר֑וֹס לִבְנ֖וֹת וְלִנְטֽוֹעַ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: See, I have this day set thee over the nations and over the kingdoms, to root out, and to pull down, and to destroy, and to throw down, to build, and to plant.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et factum est verbum Domini ad me, dicens :  Quid tu vides, Jeremia ? Et dixi :  Virgam vigilantem ego video.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֤י דְבַר־יְהֹוָה֙ אֵלַ֣י לֵאמֹ֔ר מָה־אַתָּ֥ה רֹאֶ֖ה יִרְמְיָ֑הוּ וָאֹמַ֕ר מַקֵּ֥ל שָׁקֵ֖ד אֲנִ֥י רֹאֶֽה׃
verses.king_james: Moreover the word of the Lord came unto me, saying, Jeremiah, what seest thou? And I said, I see a rod of an almond tree.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit Dominus ad me :  Bene vidisti :  quia vigilabo ego super verbo meo,  ut faciam illud.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֧אמֶר יְהֹוָ֛ה אֵלַ֖י הֵיטַ֣בְתָּ לִרְא֑וֹת כִּֽי־שֹׁקֵ֥ד אֲנִ֛י עַל־דְּבָרִ֖י לַעֲשֹׂתֽוֹ׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Then said the Lord unto me, Thou hast well seen: for I will hasten my word to perform it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et factum est verbum Domini secundo ad me, dicens :  Quid tu vides ? Et dixi :  Ollam succensam ego video,  et faciem ejus a facie aquilonis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֨י דְבַר־יְהֹוָ֤ה ׀ אֵלַי֙ שֵׁנִ֣ית לֵאמֹ֔ר מָ֥ה אַתָּ֖ה רֹאֶ֑ה וָאֹמַ֗ר סִ֤יר נָפ֙וּחַ֙ אֲנִ֣י רֹאֶ֔ה וּפָנָ֖יו מִפְּנֵ֥י צָפֽוֹנָה׃
verses.king_james: And the word of the Lord came unto me the second time, saying, What seest thou? And I said, I see a seething pot; and the face thereof is toward the north.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit Dominus ad me :  Ab aquilone pandetur malum  super omnes habitatores terræ :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֥אמֶר יְהֹוָ֖ה אֵלָ֑י מִצָּפוֹן֙ תִּפָּתַ֣ח הָרָעָ֔ה עַ֥ל כׇּל־יֹשְׁבֵ֖י הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: Then the Lord said unto me, Out of the north an evil shall break forth upon all the inhabitants of the land.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia ecce ego convocabo omnes cognationes regnorum aquilonis,  ait Dominus :  et venient, et ponent unusquisque solium suum  in introitu portarum Jerusalem,  et super omnes muros ejus in circuitu,  et super universas urbes Juda :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י ׀ הִנְנִ֣י קֹרֵ֗א לְכׇֽל־מִשְׁפְּח֛וֹת מַמְלְכ֥וֹת צָפ֖וֹנָה נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֑ה וּבָ֡אוּ וְֽנָתְנוּ֩ אִ֨ישׁ כִּסְא֜וֹ פֶּ֣תַח ׀ שַׁעֲרֵ֣י יְרוּשָׁלַ֗͏ִם וְעַ֤ל כׇּל־חוֹמֹתֶ֙יהָ֙ סָבִ֔יב וְעַ֖ל כׇּל־עָרֵ֥י יְהוּדָֽה׃
verses.king_james: For, lo, I will call all the families of the kingdoms of the north, saith the Lord; and they shall come, and they shall set every one his throne at the entering of the gates of Jerusalem, and against all the walls thereof round about, and against all the cities of Judah.

verses.latin_vulgate: et loquar judicia mea cum eis  super omnem malitiam eorum qui dereliquerunt me,  et libaverunt diis alienis,  et adoraverunt opus manuum suarum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְדִבַּרְתִּ֤י מִשְׁפָּטַי֙ אוֹתָ֔ם עַ֖ל כׇּל־רָעָתָ֑ם אֲשֶׁ֣ר עֲזָב֗וּנִי וַֽיְקַטְּרוּ֙ לֵאלֹהִ֣ים אֲחֵרִ֔ים וַיִּֽשְׁתַּחֲו֖וּ לְמַעֲשֵׂ֥י יְדֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: And I will utter my judgments against them touching all their wickedness, who have forsaken me, and have burned incense unto other gods, and worshipped the works of their own hands.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu ergo, accinge lumbos tuos,  et surge, et loquere ad eos  omnia quæ ego præcipio tibi.  Ne formides a facie eorum,  nec enim timere te faciam vultum eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּה֙ תֶּאְזֹ֣ר מׇתְנֶ֔יךָ וְקַמְתָּ֙ וְדִבַּרְתָּ֣ אֲלֵיהֶ֔ם אֵ֛ת כׇּל־אֲשֶׁ֥ר אָנֹכִ֖י אֲצַוֶּ֑ךָּ אַל־תֵּחַת֙ מִפְּנֵיהֶ֔ם פֶּֽן־אֲחִתְּךָ֖ לִפְנֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: Thou therefore gird up thy loins, and arise, and speak unto them all that I command thee: be not dismayed at their faces, lest I confound thee before them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego quippe dedi te hodie in civitatem munitam,  et in columnam ferream,  et in murum æreum,  super omnem terram,  regibus Juda, principibus ejus,  et sacerdotibus, et populo terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲנִ֞י הִנֵּ֧ה נְתַתִּ֣יךָ הַיּ֗וֹם לְעִ֨יר מִבְצָ֜ר וּלְעַמּ֥וּד בַּרְזֶ֛ל וּלְחֹמ֥וֹת נְחֹ֖שֶׁת עַל־כׇּל־הָאָ֑רֶץ לְמַלְכֵ֤י יְהוּדָה֙ לְשָׂרֶ֔יהָ לְכֹהֲנֶ֖יהָ וּלְעַ֥ם הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: For, behold, I have made thee this day a defenced city, and an iron pillar, and brasen walls against the whole land, against the kings of Judah, against the princes thereof, against the priests thereof, and against the people of the land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et bellabunt adversum te,  et non prævalebunt,  quia ego tecum sum, ait Dominus, ut liberem te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנִלְחֲמ֥וּ אֵלֶ֖יךָ וְלֹא־י֣וּכְלוּ לָ֑ךְ כִּי־אִתְּךָ֥ אֲנִ֛י נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֖ה לְהַצִּילֶֽךָ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: And they shall fight against thee; but they shall not prevail against thee; for I am with thee, saith the Lord, to deliver thee.
